description: Create a 3D model of a connecting rod with an I-beam profile shank in FreeCAD. The model must feature a center-to-center distance of 100 mm and a total thickness of 10 mm. The big end requires an outer diameter of 40 mm and an inner hole diameter of 30 mm, while the small end requires an outer diameter of 20 mm and an inner hole diameter of 12 mm. The shank is 12 mm wide and must include a 60 mm long by 6 mm wide rectangular pocket with a depth of 2 mm on both the top and bottom faces. Save the final model to /home/ga/Documents/FreeCAD/connecting_rod.FCStd.
